_meta.description: Stock domain hypothesis registry for GBGF validation pipeline (P3-05). All hypotheses use mock/synthetic data. Not for production trading.
guardrails: All validation uses synthetic deterministic data — NOT real market data
Human review required before any promotion past T2
Production write is blocked by G09/G10 until all gates pass and human review complete

hypotheses.description: 20-day price momentum signal: buy if 20d trailing return > 0, sell if < 0. Tests whether recent price trend persists over next 5 trading days.
hypotheses.expected_signal: Positive autocorrelation in 20d momentum; next-5d return positive when signal=1
hypotheses.notes: Classic momentum hypothesis. G03 FAIL expected on random mock data — no real edge.

reasons: ROI not positive across all windows

hypotheses.description: 5-day RSI mean reversion: buy when RSI(5) < 30 (oversold), sell when RSI(5) > 70 (overbought). Tests short-term price reversal.
hypotheses.expected_signal: Mean reversion: oversold condition predicts positive next-5d return
hypotheses.notes: RSI-based short-term reversion. G03 FAIL expected on random mock data.

reasons: ROI not positive across all windows

hypotheses.description: Volume breakout signal: buy if today's volume > 1.5x 20-day average AND close > open (up-day). Tests whether high-volume up-days predict continuation.
hypotheses.expected_signal: High-volume up-days predict positive next-5d momentum (institutional accumulation signal)
hypotheses.notes: Volume breakout. G03 FAIL expected on random mock data — no real volume pattern.

reasons: ROI not positive across all windows
